issues.description: First effect has wrong trigger. The text says 'If your Character...would be K.O.'d, you may trash 1 card from your hand instead' which is a replacement effect preventing KO, not an OnKO trigger that fires after KO happens. This should be a preventative effect that triggers before KO.
First effect missing condition check for 'Character with a base cost of 4 or more'. The current condition only checks turn count, but the effect only applies to Characters with cost >= 4.

First effect has wrong action type. The text says 'you may trash 1 card from your hand instead' meaning this prevents the KO from happening. The DSL needs to represent that this is a replacement effect that prevents KO, not just trashing a card after KO.
Second effect missing cost requirement. The text says '[Activate: Main] You may rest this Leader' but the DSL doesn't specify that resting the Leader is the cost.
Second effect PowerBoost should specify 'up to 1' in the target, meaning it's optional to choose a target.

Second effect GiveKeyword is missing filter for 'Characters without a [When Attacking] effect'. The DSL allows choosing any own character, but it should only target characters without OnAttack effects.
